title: Structured Resume Builder
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a structured resume in Markdown format with the following sections: Education, Work Experience, Skills, and Achievements. The resume should be under 500 words and include at least 3 work experiences, 2 skills, and 1 achievement. The work experiences should be in reverse chronological order.
constraints: Must include Education and Work Experience sections
Work experiences should be in reverse chronological order

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the resume has the required sections and they are in the correct order.
Check if the word count of the resume is under 500 words.
Check if the work experiences are in reverse chronological order.
Check if the Education, Work Experience, Skills, and Achievements sections have relevant content.
